response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes), demonstrated testing depth (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops), and directly relevant AI-agent development experience including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling. High-scale backend work (millions of requests/second) and end-to-end product delivery match the role's responsibilities. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and Vitest is not named, though the surrounding skill set suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development in current role
Strong testing culture: TDD practice, built test frameworks/assert libraries, taught testing workshops
concerns: Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named despite broad testing background
